treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient was referred to the ED for IV antibiotics after urine culture showed quinolone-resistant Proteus.
Upon arrival to the floor, the patient reports feeling well and does not feel increasingly confused.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient noted to have increased agitation and bloody urine.
Urine culture returned positive for quinolone-resistant Proteus.
Patient referred to the ED for IV antibiotics.
Patient reports feeling well upon arrival to the floor.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Patient should be seen by the doctor at the nursing home upon return.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient believes she is at the hospital to visit her nephew.
